apiEvidence.reason: T14 is a visual harness task and does not add or call product APIs. API call evidence remains owned by T03-T05, T13, T15, and T16.

visualEvidence.details: Each screen has reference, actual, diff, metrics, and summary artifacts. Raster pixelmatch is unavailable, so no pixel-perfect PASS is claimed.

knownGaps.reason: No local PNG rasterizer/pixelmatch dependency is present, so the harness cannot claim pixel-perfect visual PASS.
